steps.title: Apply the correlation claim
steps.content: The researchers found that bulkheads are more strongly negatively correlated with waterbird community integrity than riprap is. A direct illustration should compare a high-bulkhead site with a high-riprap site and show the high-bulkhead site having a lower IWCI score.

steps.title: Reject unclear comparisons
steps.content: A compares two sites both higher in bulkheads than riprap. B uses equal hardening at one site and different percentages at another. D compares overall hardening levels without isolating bulkheads from riprap. The answer is C.
